## Prerequisites:
Connect to the instance using below code

```bash
nc foggy-cliff.picoctf.net 52099
```

after we connect to the instance we get below code:

```bash
┌──(tanush㉿kali)-[~/Downloads]
└─$ nc foggy-cliff.picoctf.net 52099
⊹──────[ BYTEMANCY-1 ]──────⊹
☍⟐☉⟊☽☈⟁⧋⟡☍⟐☉⟊☽☈⟁⧋⟡☍⟐☉⟊☽☈⟁⧋⟡☍⟐

Send me ASCII DECIMAL 101 1751 times, side-by-side, no space.

☍⟐☉⟊☽☈⟁⧋⟡☍⟐☉⟊☽☈⟁⧋⟡☍⟐☉⟊☽☈⟁⧋⟡☍⟐
⊹─────────────⟡─────────────⊹
==> 

```

here we get a hint as an ASCII DECIMAL numbered 101--> which is 'e'. and we have to repeat it 1751 times, this gives us below result

```text


```
After we enter this as input we get below flag:
```text
picoCTF{h0w_m4ny_e's???_6e0cc4c6}
```
